summary:
The provided evidence does not support the use of CRISPR/Cas12a for detecting EGFR mutations in circulating DNA; instead, it focuses solely on therapeutics like canertinib and margetuximab unrelated to diagnostic applications. No documentation exists within the dataset regarding CRISPR-based technologies applied to liquid biopsies or genomic analysis of cancer-related gene variants.  

(Word count: 98)
